title: INI Configuration
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a configuration file in INI format, which organises key-value pairs under named sections. INI files are widely used for application and tool configuration across many platforms.

## When to use
Use `media:ini;textable;record` when a node produces or consumes INI-formatted configuration. For more structured configuration formats, see [TOML Document](https://capdag.com/browse/media:toml;textable;record) or [YAML Document](https://capdag.com/browse/media:record;textable;yaml).

## Notes
The INI format has no universal specification; conventions for handling comments, multi-line values, and duplicate keys vary across parsers. Consumers should confirm parser compatibility with the producing node's dialect.
